summary: The diff implements comprehensive mobile layout fixes addressing both REQ-1 and REQ-2. Changes include: proper viewport meta tag configuration (width=device-width, maximum-scale=5.0), overflow-x:hidden applied to html/body/#root, container max-w-full constraints throughout all pages, responsive text sizing (sm:text-* breakpoints), mobile-optimized chatbot positioning, and mobile menu implementation in header. All changes preserve desktop layout and maintain the dark theme with glassmorphism aesthetic.
